author: codex-root

patch.value:
## Scope

Security remediation, dependency modernization, CI reproducibility, GitHub Actions maintenance, repository inspection, governed delivery, and merged-head proof.

## Live baseline

- 15 open Dependabot PRs
- Critical Vitest alert GHSA-5xrq-8626-4rwp / CVE-2026-47429
- 28 local Bun audit findings across runtime and development dependency paths
- Representative PRs fail frozen install because bun.lock is stale
- No open CodeQL or secret-scanning alerts
Eliminate known dependency vulnerabilities, restore reliable automated updates, modernize CI actions, and leave a governed maintenance backlog.

Zero actionable Bun audit advisories after supported upgrades; all local quality, coverage, package, and security gates pass; GitHub dependency and security alerts are cleared or explicitly documented; PM tracker is healthy and contains reproducible evidence; changes are reviewed, merged, and verified on the default branch
Authenticated GitHub access, clean default-branch baseline, live alert inventory, and repository-local PM tracker available.
Protect Home Assistant operators and keep the agent-facing CLI maintainable.
Removes exploitable dependency paths and makes future automated upgrades verifiable.
A current, reproducible, security-gated release pipeline with no stale update backlog.
A critical Vitest advisory, multiple high-severity runtime/tooling advisories, and fifteen failing Dependabot PRs are open.

value.author: codex-root
value.text: Live baseline: 15 open Dependabot PRs; one critical Dependabot alert GHSA-5xrq-8626-4rwp; zero open CodeQL and secret-scanning alerts.

value.author: codex-root
value.text: Representative PR checks fail at bun install --frozen-lockfile because package.json and bun.lock diverge.

value.author: codex-root
value.text: Dependency PRs must update bun.lock coherently; otherwise every CI job fails before exercising the proposed update.

message: Bootstrap root remediation epic from live GitHub and audit evidence

author: codex-root
message: Nest remediation under durable product roadmap
